calendar.name: calendar
calendar.description: Calendar management via CalDAV or Google Calendar
calendar.author: CupBots
primitives: /event delete --uid <uid>                  — delete by exact UID (get UID from /event search)
/event search --query "standup" [--days 30] — list matching events with UIDs
calendar.intent: Create, view, edit, or delete calendar events, meetings, appointments, huddles. Recurring event schedules. Manage availability preferences (no weekends, work hours) and refuse overlapping events.
calendar.not_intent: Sending WhatsApp messages to someone at a scheduled time
config: Google service account JSON (path or inline)
Required for google backend (service account auth)
Default: primary. Use a specific calendar ID for shared calendars
For OAuth2 refresh token auth (alternative to service account)

marketplace.tagline: Full calendar management from WhatsApp — CalDAV or Google Calendar
marketplace.long_description: View your agenda, find free slots, and create events using natural language — all from WhatsApp. Refuses overlapping events and prompts you to confirm, cancel, or draft a polite reschedule reply. Set availability preferences (no weekends, work hours, blocked days) so the AI agent never offers a time you can't make. Supports CalDAV (Radicale, Nextcloud) and Google Calendar. Recurring events, ICS imports, holiday syncing.

community.name: community
community.description: All-in-one WhatsApp community management — gamification, moderation, onboarding, analytics, roles, and scheduled content
community.author: CupBots
community.intent: Manage WhatsApp community — gamification, moderation, member onboarding, analytics

marketplace.tagline: Run your community like a pro
marketplace.long_description:
The all-in-one toolkit for WhatsApp community managers. Replace GoHighLevel, Periskope, and CommuniPass with a single bot that lives inside your chat.

**Gamification** — Award points for activity. Members level up from Newcomer to Legend. Leaderboards drive engagement without you lifting a finger.

**Moderation** — Keyword filters, spam detection, warning system, auto-kick. Set it and forget it.

**Onboarding** — New members automatically get a welcome DM when they join.

**Roles** — Create custom roles (Moderator, VIP, Mentor) and assign them to members.

**Analytics** — Track active members, engagement rates, and activity trends.

**Scheduled Content** — Daily tips, weekly digests, recurring announcements.

**Why $49/mo?** — Communities using GoHighLevel pay $97-497/mo. Periskope charges $20-30/seat. CommuniPass is $199/mo. CupBots Community gives you everything at a fraction of the cost, running natively inside WhatsApp.

mailwatch.name: mailwatch
mailwatch.description: Watch email inboxes (IMAP or AgentMail) and process unread messages with rules — keyword, regex, attachment, or AI matching with actions like notify, CRM update, calendar import, and draft replies. Send replies via AgentMail with auto-send rules or WhatsApp approval. For Gmail integration, set up a forwarding rule to your AgentMail address — works for both Workspace and consumer Gmail with zero OAuth.
mailwatch.author: CupBots
mailwatch.intent: Monitor email inboxes, forward matching emails to WhatsApp, and send replies via AgentMail
config: Default WhatsApp JID for notifications (per-mailbox notify_chat overrides this)
API key from agentmail.to — enables outbound email sending
AgentMail inbox address used as sender and inbox_id, e.g. pa@ai.cupbots.com
Sender display name, e.g. ClientName Assistant
Fallback reply-to for new emails (replies auto-use the inbound address)
Svix signing secret (whsec_...) for verifying inbound webhooks via hub relay

marketplace.tagline: Turn your inbox into an automation engine
marketplace.long_description: Watch your email inbox and process unread messages automatically based on rules you define. Polls every 5 minutes for unread (UNSEEN) emails only — emails you've already read in your mail client are skipped. If an unread email doesn't match any rule, it stays unread so newly added rules can catch it on the next poll. Match emails by keyword, regex, attachment type, or AI classification. Actions include WhatsApp notifications, CRM updates, calendar imports, and AI-drafted replies with auto-send or WhatsApp approval via AgentMail. Set up rules like 'any email from @acme.com with an invoice attachment -> notify me' and let the bot handle the rest.

primitives: /report build --id <id>                    — render HTML + PDF, register preview

config: e.g. green, navy, earth. Default: green

Tweak sections in plain English, change brand palettes, swap assets. Accepts edits via WhatsApp or email. Hosted preview URL for stakeholder review. Designed for sustainability statements, annual reports, and ESG disclosures at Big 4 consultant quality.
